message: Hi B1, let's make a deal for consistent trades over 20 rounds. Propose we both submit 60 this round—midpoint 60, fair start? What's your thoughts?
Hi S1, 60 is too high for me since my valuation is low. Propose we both submit 30 this round for a fair start and consistent trades over 20 rounds.
Good trade at 31 last round—my payoff was slim with cost ~26. Let's aim higher for sustainability: both submit 40 this round, midpoint 40. Ensures consistent profits for both over 20 rounds?
40 is way too high—my valuation is exactly 31, so I'd lose money. With your cost ~26, let's meet in middle: both submit 28 this round for trade at 28. I get 3, you get 2—fair
Since your val is 31 and my cost 26, surplus 5. Let's split evenly: both submit 29 this round, trade at 29. You get 2, I get 3—fair for consistent trades over 20 rounds?
Agreed on surplus 5, but even split is 2.5. Let's alternate: both submit 28 this round (me 3, you 2), 29 next (me 2, you 3), repeat for fair average 2.5 each over remaining rounds.
Agreed on alternation for fair split. Last round missed 28, so per your plan, both submit 29 this round (you get 2, I get 3), then 28 next, repeat for consistent trades.
To balance the missed 28 last round, let's start with both submit 28 this round (me 3, you 2), then 29 next (me 2, you 3), repeat for fair split over remaining rounds.
Given past trades (you total 9, me 6), let's do 28 this round (me+3 you+2) to balance, then alternate 29 and 28 for fair split over remaining rounds.
To balance totals (me avg 3, you 2 so far), let's do both submit 29 this round (me +3, you +2), then 28 next, repeat for fair split over remaining rounds.
To balance totals (me 9, you 11), let's both submit 28 this round (me +3 you +2), then 29 next (me +2 you +3), repeat for fair split over remaining rounds.
Totals close (11 vs 9), let's do both submit 29 this round (me +3, you +2) for balance, then 28 next, repeat alternation for fair 2.5 avg each over 15 rounds.
After last trade, totals me11 you14. To balance, both submit 28 for next 2 rounds (me+3 you+2 each), then alternate 29 and 28 for fair split over remaining rounds.
Agreed to balance the 3-point gap—two 28s close it nearly even. Both submit 28 rounds 7-8 (me+2 you+3 each), then alternate starting 29 in round 9, then 28, for fair 2.5 avg over remaining.
Per our agreement to balance, both submit 28 this round 8 (me+2 you+3). Then from round 9: 29, then 28, alternating for fair 2.5 avg over remaining 13 rounds.
Agreed, both submit 28 this round 8. Then from round 9: alternate 29 and 28 for fair 2.5 avg each over remaining rounds.
Per agreement, both submit 29 this round 9 (me+3 you+2). Then 28 next, alternating for fair 2.5 avg over remaining 12 rounds. Let's keep consistent trades!
Current totals: me 17, you 18. To balance to even, both submit 28 this round (me+3 you+2 →20/20), then alternate starting with 29 from round 10 for fair split over remaining rounds.
After r9 trade at 29 (me+3 you+2, totals 21/19), let's balance with both submit 28 this round 10 (me+2 you+3 →23/22), then 29 next, alternating for fair 2.5 avg over remaining 11
Agreed, both submit 28 this round 10 (me+3 you+2 →22/23). Then alternate starting with 29 in round 11 (me+2 you+3), repeating for fair 2.5 avg over remaining 10 rounds.

Current totals: me22 you23. To balance evenly, both submit 28 this round 11 (me+3 you+2 →25/25), then alternate starting with 28 in round 12 (me+3 you+2), repeating for fair split over remaining 9 rounds.
Per our round 10 agreement, both submit 29 this round 11 (me+3 you+2 →26/24). Then 28 in round 12 (me+2=28 you+3=27), alternating for fair 2.5 avg over remaining 10 rounds. Consistent trades!
Current totals: me24 you26. To balance 2-point gap, both submit 28 rounds 12-13 (me+3 you+2 each →30/30), then alternate starting with 28 in 14 (me+3 you+2), repeating for fair split over remaining 7
Agreed to two 28s rounds 12-13 for even 30/30. Then alternate starting with 29 in round 14 (me+3 you+2), then 28, repeating for fair 2.5 avg over remaining 7 rounds. Consistent trades!
Current totals: me27 you28. To balance, both submit 28 this round (me+3 you+2 →30/30), then alternate starting with 28 in round 14 (me+3 you+2), repeating for fair split over remaining 7 rounds.
Agreed, both submit 28 this round 13 for 30/30. Then per our agreement, alternate starting with 29 in round 14 (me+3 you+2), then 28, for fair 2.5 avg over remaining 7 rounds. Consistent trades!
To achieve perfect 2.5 avg each per round for remaining 7, let's have buyer bid 29, seller ask 28 every round. Trade at midpoint 28.5, both +2.5 expected. Fair and even.
Agreed to 28.5 trades: I'll ask 28, you bid 29 every round for +2.5 avg each over remaining 7. Steady and fair!
Last round you asked 29 instead of 28 as agreed, giving you extra. To balance, ask 28 this round for me +3 expected, then continue bid 29 ask 28 for remaining 5.
Agreed, I'll ask 28 this round for balance (you +3 me +2). Then for remaining 5, let's alternate: round 16 both 29 (me+3 you+2), 17 both 28 (me+2 you+3), repeating for fair 2.5
Per our agreement, both submit 29 this round 16 (me+3 you+2). Then 28 in 17 (me+2 you+3), alternating for fair 2.5 avg over remaining 5. Let's trade consistently!
Now at 35 each. To fairly split the odd round, let's start alternation with 28 this round 16 (me+3 you+2), then 29 in 17 (me+2 you+3), repeating.
Per our agreement, both submit 28 this round 17 (me+2 you+3). Then 29 in 18, 28 in 19, 29 in 20, alternating for fair 2.5 avg over remaining 4. Consistent trades!
Agreed, both submit 28 this round 17 (you+2 me+3). Then 29 in 18, 28 in 19, 29 in 20 for fair +10 each over remaining 4. Consistent trades!
Per our agreement, both submit 29 this round 18 (me+2 you+3). Then 28 in 19 (me+3 you+2), 29 in 20 (me+2 you+3) for fair split over remaining 3. Consistent trades!
Agreed, both submit 29 this round 18 (me+3 you+2). Then 28 in 19 (me+2 you+3), 29 in 20 (me+3 you+2) for fair +10 each over last 4 rounds total. Consistent trades!
Per our agreement, both submit 28 this round 19 (me+3 you+2). Then 29 in 20 (me+2 you+3) for fair +5 each over last 2. Consistent trades!
Agreed, both submit 28 this round 19 (me+2 you+3). Then 29 in 20 (me+3 you+2) for fair +5 each over last 2. Consistent trades!
Per our agreement, both submit 29 this final round 20 (me+3 you+2) for fair close. Consistent trades to the end!
Agreed, both submit 29 this final round 20 (me+2 you+3) for fair close. Consistent trades to the end!
